constantsChosen.branchExtraGap: no separate constant; condition arms + diamond join sit one full row (112px drop) below the If, and the merged trunk after the join is a full-row drop too

verticalGuarantees.jogLowerLeg: drop - RAIL_INSET - r ~= 112 - 22 - 14 = 76px >= 64 (crossing pushed near top)
verticalGuarantees.mergedTrunk: join->continuation is a full-row next edge -> same 112px drop

e2eSummary: ALL solo (one at a time, ports freed between): campaign-builder 16/16, campaign-node-editors 10/10, campaign-list-detail 7/7 + campaign-list-no-overflow 1/1, broadcast-and-campaign 12/12. Unit: layout.test.ts + orthogonal-path.test.ts 37/37; full campaign unit suite 126/126.
lintNote: only the 7 known pre-existing react-hooks 'rule not found' errors (none in campaigns/); no new lint errors.
notes: Floor enforced by maximizing the ANCHORABLE run, not just the gap: routing uses FIXED-px rail insets (RAIL_INSET) instead of fractional thirds, pushing horizontal crossings to the drop's ends so the middle/lower vertical run stays tall. verticalAnchor re-anchors each (+) to the middle of the taller run. layout.height grows with rowHeight (no clipping). down-only + axis-aligned + convergence checks preserved/strengthened. Version 0.41.2 -> 0.41.3. NOT committed/pushed (orchestrator commits). Visual fine-tune: bump MIN_SEGMENT + LAYOUT.rowHeight in tandem; RAIL_INSET tunes how close corners hug the ends.
